forms.caption: Plastic Surgery (main navigation hub)
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmPlasticSurgery navigation hub — implement panel/module routing in React

forms.caption: Surgeon Clinical Data
forms.description: Child-form host — Load_ChildForm pattern routes to FN_Orders OCX controls
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmPlastiSurg — implement surgeon clinical data routing and child form loading

forms.caption: Breast Examination
forms.description: Loads FN_BreastExam.BreastMeasSim OCX; Set_Default saves to DEFAULT_CLINICAL table
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmBreastExam — implement breast exam form with AI flag detection and measurement capture

forms.caption: Diagnosis
forms.description: ICD code search and multi-select; reads from ICD_TEMPLATE, saves to EVALUATION_MANAGEMENT
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmDiagnosis — implement ICD search, multi-select, and EVALUATION_MANAGEMENT persistence

forms.caption: Patient Emergency Contact
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmEmergContact — implement emergency contact capture in patient intake flow

forms.caption: Mental Status Selection
forms.description: Spreadsheet-style grid with ComboBox cells; groups: Orientation, Memory, Affect, Behavior, Cognition, Speech, Mood
forms.jiraStory: Migrate fmCareIntrvn (Mental Status) — implement group-based term selection with clinical note generation

forms.caption: Appointments
forms.description: Large form with FPSpread grids for visit history, DTPicker for time, facilities panel
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmInPatientAppt — implement appointment scheduling with visit history and status workflow

forms.caption: Electronic Medical Record
forms.description: Largest form — full inpatient EMR with patient roster, progress notes (tablet + standard), encounter management, coding, spell checker
forms.jiraStory: Migrate frmNursingHome — implement full inpatient EMR with roster, progress notes, and encounter management
forms.notes: 40K line form — recommend splitting into sub-components by section for Sprint 2-3
